description: Input schema for HappyHorse 1.0 Video Edit.

prompt.description: Editing instruction describing what to change. Up to 5000 non-Chinese characters. E.g., 'Make the character wear the striped sweater from the image'.
prompt.title: Prompt

video.description: Video to edit. MP4/MOV (H.264 recommended). Duration: 3-60s. Resolution: longer side <= 2160px, shorter side >= 320px. Aspect ratio: 1:2.5 to 2.5:1. Up to 100MB. Frame rate > 8fps.
video.title: Video

reference_images.description: Reference images for editing (e.g., clothing to apply). Up to 5 images. JPEG/JPG/PNG/WEBP, width and height at least 300px. Up to 10MB each.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

audio_setting.description: Audio handling: 'auto' (model decides) or 'origin' (keep original audio).

title: AppInput
